content: KPI dashboard for B2B distribution/warehouse: essential metrics include total products in catalog, current low-stock count, stock movements today (in/out volume), total active suppliers, open PO count by status, and inventory value. Advanced: order fulfillment rate, on-time delivery, inventory turnover, perfect order rate. For SME MIS MVP the dashboard should show 4-6 headline KPIs plus real-time low-stock alerts and PO status summary as the core decision-support surface.
